NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF SHEINFIELD, FREDERICK PAUL ON JUL-07-2014 THROUGH JUL-11-2014 JUL-25-14; AUG-11-14 THROUGH AUG-25-14 (TRANSACTION ID # 55683336) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF RAE LAIRD IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE, VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND FORM INTERROGATORIES SERVED ON JULY 2, 2014 WITHIN 15 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER ON THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF RAE LAIRD IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN HIS OR HER POSSESSION, CUSTODY AND CONTROL TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SERVED ON JULY 2, 2014 WITHIN 15 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER ON THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF RAE LAIRD IS ORDERED TO PAY $500.00 IN SANCTIONS BY CERTIFIED CHECK MADE PAYABLE TO THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WITHIN 15 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER ON THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM PETER VAN ZANDT, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (302).

calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2015 Continued To Jun-09-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant City And County Of San Franciscos Notice Of Motion, Motion For Further Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order
Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Further Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order is off calendar per agreement of the parties. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion, Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-31-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederick P. Sheinfield, Esq., for the defendant City and County of San Francisco. No other appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses and for Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff RAE LAIRD is ORDERED to serve complete, verified responses without objection to Defendant's Special Interrogatories and Form Interrogatories served on July 2, 2014 within 15 days of service of the Notice of Entry of Order on this motion. Plaintiff RAE LAIRD is ORDERED to provide all responsive documents within his or her possession, custody and control to Defendant's Request for Production of Documents served on July 2, 2014 within 15 days of service of the Notice of Entry of Order on this motion. Plaintiff RAE LAIRD is ORDERED to pay $500.00 in sanctions by certified check made payable to the City and County of San Francisco within 15 days of service of the Notice of Entry of Order on this motion. Order signed. JUDGE PRO TEM PETER VAN ZANDT, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (302).
